ASCEND.description: Move toward [gold]Faith[/gold]. Remove up to that much [purple]Burden[/purple]. Any excess becomes [gold]Faith[/gold].
ASCEND.title: Ascend
DESCEND.description: Move toward [purple]Burden[/purple]. Remove up to that much [gold]Faith[/gold]. Any excess becomes [purple]Burden[/purple].
DESCEND.title: Descend
ATONE.description: Heal the target. The Penitent [purple]Descends[/purple] by the HP restored.
ATONE.title: Atone
FAITH.description: Positive scale value. [gold]Prophet[/gold] effects are active while you have 6 or more [gold]Faith[/gold].
FAITH.title: Faith
BURDEN.description: Negative scale value. [purple]Heretic[/purple] effects are active while you have 6 or more [purple]Burden[/purple].
BURDEN.title: Burden
PROPHET.description: You are [gold]Prophet[/gold] while you have 6 or more [gold]Faith[/gold].
PROPHET.title: Prophet
PENITENT.description: You are Penitent while you have less than 6 [gold]Faith[/gold] and less than 6 [purple]Burden[/purple].
PENITENT.title: Penitent
HERETIC.description: You are [purple]Heretic[/purple] while you have 6 or more [purple]Burden[/purple].
HERETIC.title: Heretic
